title: Harden Generator wrapper safety gates
goal: Strengthen Generator wrapper branch isolation, task-scoped output path enforcement, and JSON result validation; explain remaining automation design before implementation.

include: TASK ledger, spec, and session log

success_criteria: Wrapper rejects real Generator runs unless current branch is task/{TASK-ID}.
Wrapper parses Generator stdout as JSON and validates required Generator output fields before marking PENDING_VALIDATION.
Markdown handoff behavior is explained and hardened.
Validator/retry automation design is provided to the user before implementation.

positive: Use dry-run and static checks only.
negative: Do not run real Claude CLI generation.
Do not implement Validator/retry automation before user approval.
